name: io.github.TeodorMCP/universal-connector-mcp
description: Security-first MCP server that connects any OpenAPI, GraphQL, gRPC or SOAP API to AI agents.

environmentVariables.name: UCMCP_ALLOWED_HOSTS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated extra hosts allowed for outbound calls (spec hosts are allowed automatically).

environmentVariables.name: UCMCP_APIS_CONFIG
environmentVariables.description: Path to a YAML file of APIs to preload at startup.

environmentVariables.name: UCMCP_CACHE_TTL
environmentVariables.description: TTL in seconds for caching read-only responses (default 60, 0 disables).

environmentVariables.name: UCMCP_BLOCK_PRIVATE_IPS
environmentVariables.description: Block outbound calls to private/loopback/link-local/cloud-metadata IPs (SSRF protection). Default true.

environmentVariables.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Example credential convention: <API_NAME>_TOKEN / <API_NAME>_API_KEY are injected for the API loaded under that name.
